review_notes_addressed.shared_finding: Both reviewers flagged /day lacking auth guard — unauthenticated users stuck on eternal loading after / → /day redirect (Product N4/N5, Technical T9). Fixed by adding useRequireRole to DayPage.
product_nits_fixed: N1/N2: Tailwind + globals.css hex values aligned to design §3.1 byte-for-byte (ink #09090b, teal #0f766e, amber #a16207, rose #9f1239, indigo #4338ca, emerald #047857, borderRadius 4/6px)
N4/N5: /day redirects unauthenticated users to /login via useRequireRole(ALL_ROLES)
technical_nits_fixed: T4: useRequireRole effect deps stabilized via allowed.join(',')
T9: /day now guards auth via useRequireRole (same as N4/N5)
T10: audit.routes.test.ts gains 401 UNAUTHENTICATED + 403 TECHNICIAN + 400 bad-date cases
deferred_non_blocker: Product N3: docs/mockups/*.html stubs referenced (Sprint 5 scope per plan)
Technical T10-last: openclaw-prefixed bot-key 403 test (botScopeGuard covers it separately; already tested in Sprint 1)
Technical nit: Prisma.DateTimeFilter typing in audit.ts (cosmetic)
Technical nit: /admin/audit entityId tooltip for cuid2 prefix collision (UX polish)
